title: Mini cricket brings max enjoyment
description: PLETTENBERG BAY - Seven primary schools from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY - Seven primary schools from Bitou converged on Plettenberg Primary School on Saturday 9 November to participate in the KFC Mini Cricket Regional competition.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY - Seven primary schools from Bitou converged on Plettenberg Primary School on Saturday 9 November to participate in the KFC Mini Cricket Regional competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"About 120 aspirant cricketers were part of the South Western Districts cricket festival, with U-7, U-8, U-9 and U-13 teams from Greenwood Bay, Phakamisani, Kranshoek and Plett, among others, taking part in the Garden Route Badgers event.","html":"About 120 aspirant cricketers were part of the South Western Districts cricket festival, with U-7, U-8, U-9 and U-13 teams from Greenwood Bay, Phakamisani, Kranshoek and Plett, among others, taking part in the Garden Route Badgers event."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"While teams pitted their skills against each other on small pitches, the SWD officials also held coaching clinics for the boys and girls."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The day was a success, despite uncertain weather conditions,\" said Limpho Ntshudu, Mini Cricket Regional Coordinator.","html":"\"The day was a success, despite uncertain weather conditions,\" said Limpho Ntshudu, Mini Cricket Regional Coordinator."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Bigger dream'","html":"'Bigger dream'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"But the sun came out and the kids had great fun. Out of the 10 Bitou primary schools, seven participated, a commendable feat.","html":"\"But the sun came out and the kids had great fun. Out of the 10 Bitou primary schools, seven participated, a commendable feat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Greenwood Bay College U-7 team, coached by Lena Prins. Behind them, from the left are Carlos Koeberg, SWD vice-president; Rusha Van Wieling, U-19 SWD Badgers player and part of the Pioneers CC; Lena Prins; Hilmary Bock, PR and marketing member of the Plett Pioneers CC; and Gwyn Lewis, treasurer of Plett Pioneers CC.","html":"The Greenwood Bay College U-7 team, coached by Lena Prins. Behind them, from the left are Carlos Koeberg, SWD vice-president; Rusha Van Wieling, U-19 SWD Badgers player and part of the Pioneers CC; Lena Prins; Hilmary Bock, PR and marketing member of the Plett Pioneers CC; and Gwyn Lewis, treasurer of Plett Pioneers CC."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We have to say a huge thanks to the coaches/volunteers and parents for participating in the programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It always gives children the opportunity to have a bigger dream of themselves. Children from all walks of life were present and enjoyed themselves. For others, it left them with a fond memory.","html":"\"It always gives children the opportunity to have a bigger dream of themselves. Children from all walks of life were present and enjoyed themselves. For others, it left them with a fond memory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Also a big thanks to Cricket South Africa and KFC for the continued support,\" said Ntshudu.","html":"\"Also a big thanks to Cricket South Africa and KFC for the continued support,\" said Ntshudu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
